---
title: "DSA-110 Continuum Pipeline"
---

::: {.callout-note}
**Draft docs.** Content was converted from `docs/drafts/` and reflects the
repo state as of 2026-03-09. Quarto has not been installed on H17, so the
rendered site has not been validated. The `.qmd` files are syntactically
well-formed but no browser preview has been confirmed.
:::

This site documents the DSA-110 continuum imaging pipeline as it currently
exists. All pages are written against verified repo state; planned or
in-progress work is labelled explicitly.

New agents and collaborators should start with
[Agent Onboarding](agent-onboarding.qmd) before diving into the deeper pipeline
pages.

**Audience**: Operators running the pipeline on H17, and developers
extending or debugging it.

## Pages

| Page | What it covers |
|------|---------------|
| [Agent Onboarding](agent-onboarding.qmd) | How a new AI tool or collaborator should acquire trustworthy pipeline context |
| [Pipeline Overview](pipeline-overview.qmd) | Stages, entry points, calibration, imaging, mosaicking, known silent-failure risks |
| [Epoch QA](epoch-qa.qmd) | Three-gate QA system, thresholds, canary tile, diagnostic PNG |
| [Outputs and Artifacts](outputs-and-artifacts.qmd) | Directory layout, file schemas, debugging guide |

## Quick-start

```bash
# All scripts require the casa6 conda env
PYTHON=/opt/miniforge/envs/casa6/bin/python

# Single-date end-to-end run (tiles → epoch mosaics → QA → photometry)
$PYTHON scripts/batch_pipeline.py --date 2026-01-25 --cal-date 2026-01-25

# Fast regression test (< 1 min, canary tile only)
bash scripts/run_canary.sh

# Full-day mosaic by RA strip (standalone)
$PYTHON scripts/mosaic_day.py --date 2026-01-25
```

## Status summary

| Phase | Status |
|-------|--------|
| M1 — Mosaic correctness | Implemented — open performance issues remain |
| M2 — Phase 0 QA infrastructure | Implemented — validated on limited epochs |
| M3 — Reliability hardening | Not started |
| M4 — Multi-epoch production | Not started |
| M5 — Science products (light curves) | Not started |

See `TODOS.md` in the repository root for the detailed task list.

## Environment note

Do **not** use system `python3` (3.13, missing scientific dependencies).
Always use `/opt/miniforge/envs/casa6/bin/python`.
